scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @pulseforge/backend" "npm run dev -w @pulseforge/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @pulseforge/backend && npm run build -w @pulseforge/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w @pulseforge/shared && npm run test -w @pulseforge/backend
scripts.dev:fresh: lsof -ti:3000,3001,3002,4000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; npm run dev
